strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and React, matching the primary stack
Demonstrated expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and agentic workflows
Strong background in scalable systems, performance optimization, and polyglot development (TypeScript, Kotlin/Java, D, Python)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js experience, a primary required framework
Most recent role (re:cinq) is very recent (April 2025), raising questions about tenure stability
GitHub/GitLab links provided but no direct links to repositories showcasing TypeScript/Nest.js projects

key_factors.factor: Tenure stability and recent role change

response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack capabilities with TypeScript/Node.js and React, along with AI-agent expertise, aligning well with the primary stack and AI development requirements. However, the lack of explicit Nest.js experience and very recent role change may warrant further investigation during assessment.
